- **Safupie Insurance Protocol**: Penpie plans to launch Safupie, an insurance mechanism to compensate users and potentially service third-party projects.\
- **Community Governance**: Safupie will be governed by SAFU token holders, who will decide on protocol participation, compensation plans, and treasury management.\
- **Market Impact**: Penpie’s total value locked dropped 65% post-exploit, and the MGP token price fell 1.5% in the past 24 hours.

news.headline: Play With Doge: 9 Games That Feature the Dogecoin Meme Pup

news.headline: Apple and Starlink 'Literally Saving Lives' During Hurricane Helene Crisis
news.summary:

- Approximately 400,000 North Carolina residents are without power or cell service, but those with recent iPhones can still communicate using Apple’s free satellite network.\
- Elon Musk’s Starlink is also providing crucial support, with terminals being deployed by the Y’all Group to the most affected areas in the South.\
- The Y’all Group is ensuring rapid deployment and covering unlimited data plans for the Starlink terminals to aid communication.\
- Over 1.7 million customers are without power across several states, with South Carolina, Georgia, and North Carolina being the hardest hit.

- Year-to-date losses total $1.74B, heavily skewed by Bybit’s $1.46B exploit in February; excluding that, losses are around $280M, 33% lower than 2024.  \

news.headline: Upcx Suffers Major Security Breach, $70 Million in UPC Tokens Drained; Deposits and Withdrawals Suspended
news.summary:
- Upcx, a cryptocurrency platform, has experienced a significant security breach resulting in the loss of approximately $70 million in UPC tokens.\
- The breach involved unauthorized access to Upcx's management account, leading to suspicious transactions, including an upgrade to the 'ProxyAdmin' contract and the execution of the 'withdrawByAdmin' function.\
- As a precautionary measure, Upcx has temporarily suspended all deposits and withdrawals.\
- Users are advised to stay alert and verify official updates before taking any action.

news.headline: Layer 1 CEO Alex Liegl on the Institutionalization of Mining in America
news.summary:
- The discussion focuses on the impact of the Bitcoin halving on the mining market, considering factors like the coronavirus and international energy markets.\
- Alex Legal, co-founder and CEO of Layer1 Technologies, explains their innovative approach to Bitcoin mining, emphasizing energy efficiency and cooling infrastructure.\
- Layer1 Technologies aims to decentralize Bitcoin mining in the US, leveraging low-cost electricity and advanced liquid cooling technology to optimize profitability.\
- The company is working towards supply chain independence by producing its own chips, aiming to mitigate risks associated with third-party suppliers.\
- Legal highlights the potential for Layer1 to evolve beyond mining into a vertically integrated financial institution, leveraging mined Bitcoin for various financial services.\
- The conversation also touches on the importance of geographic diversification and the potential risks and opportunities in the evolving energy and cryptocurrency markets.

news.headline: DEGEN Rallies On Increasing Adoption By Base Ecosystem Projects

news.headline: TAC launches public mainnet to bring DeFi protocols like Curve and Morpho onto TON and Telegram

news.summary:
- Mog Meme Coin surged 51% this week, fueled by Elon Musk and other tech leaders adopting its branding on X, boosting its popularity.\
- Mog Coin (MOG), originating from 4Chan slang "mogging" (dominating), now symbolizes effortless cosmic domination with viral Pit Viper sunglasses branding.\
- Elon Musk changed his profile picture to Pit Vipers, and Garry Tan of Y Combinator also embraced the trend, amplifying Mog's visibility.\
- The trend, dubbed “mog/acc,” is part of pro-tech effective accelerationism, with community-driven viral branding and meme culture fueling the hype.\
- Mog Coin was launched in 2023 by a pseudonymous founder, initially joking about creating it within the Milady NFT community, evolving into a viral meme.\
- Meanwhile, notable figures like Bryan Johnson and Reid Hoffman joined the mog/acc movement, with some promoting related tokens like Pitcoin, which briefly peaked at a $6.7M market cap.

news.headline: The Protocol: How to Engineer Harder Money, or Just Make Your Own
news.summary:
- Bitcoin's upcoming halving will reduce its supply growth by 50%.\
- Ethereum researchers propose reducing ETH issuance to decrease incentives for new stakers and harden ether as a form of money.\
- Pump, a meme coin generator, has already earned $5 million in fees since its launch last month.\
- The European Union considers maximum extractable value (MEV) as a potential form of market abuse.\
- EigenLayer, a restaking protocol on Ethereum, launches on the mainnet.\
- Monad Labs raises $225 million in Series A funding, Ellipsis Labs raises $20 million, and LightLink closes a $6.2 million seed round.

news.headline: Layer 2 startup LightLink secures $4.5 million in seed round led by T\u0026B Media Global and MQDC
news.summary: Layer 2 startup LightLink has raised $4.5 million in a seed funding round led by T&B Media Global and MQDC. The funding will support LightLink's technology, which aims to enable instant, gasless transactions for dApps and enterprises on the Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain. The startup has also partnered with Animoca Brands. LightLink's technology will be used in a "multiverse project" called Translucia, which combines the virtual and physical worlds and has received $300 million in funding from T&B Media Global and MQDC. Other investors in the seed round include JellyC, Aweh Ventures, Blue7, and B3V. LightLink, developed by Pellar Technologies, ranks in the top 10 in transaction volumes among rollups and has over 215,000 unique wallet addresses operating on-chain. The funding will help LightLink make blockchain as intuitive as traditional web platforms, with a focus on gasless transactions.

news.headline: Protocol Village: Memecoin Launchpad Parlay Raises $2M, Radix Picks Brevan Howard to Run Fund
Radix’s gamified onboarding platform RadQuest simplifies Web3 for anyone
Iggy Azalea joins new Solana-based ‘celebrity coin’ launchpad Thrust as creative director, plans to migrate MOTHER token
news.summary:
- Iggy Azalea is migrating her MOTHER memecoin to Thrust, a new Solana-based launchpad aimed at reducing pump-and-dump schemes through vetted, contract-enforceable token launches.  \
- Thrust officially launches on November 7, starting with an offering from Twitch streamer N3on, who is also a co-owner of Azalea’s MOTHERLAND casino.  \
- Azalea will serve as creative director, helping to onboard pop culture into crypto and promote long-term community engagement with celebrity tokens.  \
- The platform will require celebrities to sign legal contracts outlining their obligations, aiming to ensure ongoing participation and value creation for fans.  \
- Thrust is eliminating the bonding curve model, directing all pre-sale funds into liquidity pools to reduce volatility and promote fair token distribution.  \
- Azalea plans to migrate her own MOTHER token by the end of 2025 and is in talks with Megan Fox to launch a token at Art Basel in December.

news.headline: Andrew Tate DADDY Solana Meme Coin Jumps 54% as He Leaves Romania—Thanks to Trump
news.summary:
- Andrew Tate's DADDY Solana meme coin surged 69% after he and his brother Tristan left Romania for Florida, marking his first departure since his 2022 arrest.\
- The coin's market cap jumped to $37.5 million within 10 hours, later retracting to $34.4 million, as reported by DexScreener.\
- The Tates' travel ban was lifted following pressure from Donald Trump's administration, though Romanian authorities insist criminal proceedings will continue.\
- The brothers face charges of human trafficking, sexual misconduct, and money laundering in Romania, which they deny, and Andrew also faces a British arrest warrant for rape and sexual assault.\
- The DADDY meme coin, endorsed by Tate, previously gained attention for surpassing Iggy Azalea's MOTHER token in popularity.\
- Allegations against Tate include detailed accounts of rape and sexual violence, with victims expressing disbelief and retraumatization over his travel freedom.

news.headline: Circle expands Arc ecosystem with onchain FX engine and multi-currency stablecoin partner program
news.summary:
- Circle is launching onchain FX engine StableFX and regional stablecoin support on its Arc blockchain to enable 24/7 stablecoin trading and settlement.  \
- StableFX allows approved institutions to settle multiple stablecoin currency pairs onchain with low slippage, reduced counterparty risk, and atomic settlement.  \
- The features aim to modernize the FX market, replacing traditional T+1 settlement cycles with real-time, programmable transactions.  \
- The Arc testnet launched on October 28 with over 100 participants from finance and crypto sectors, with mainnet expected next year.  \
- Circle’s Partner Stablecoins program supports regional stablecoins like BRLA, AUDF, JYPC, MXNB, KRW1, QCAD, ZARU, and PHPC, enhancing liquidity and interoperability.  \
- Analysts at Bernstein note Circle’s fundamentals remain strong despite stock volatility, citing robust Q3 earnings.

news.headline: Bitcoin Token Runecoin Hits All-Time High Price Ahead of OKX Listing
news.summary:
- Runecoin, a token associated with the RSIC Metaprotocol Ordinals collection, reached an all-time high price after OKX announced its listing.\
- OKX will list Runecoin on April 30, following a 24-hour rewards campaign allowing customers to earn tokens by staking Bitcoin.\
- The price of Runecoin surged to 29 satoshis (around $0.02) per token after the announcement.\
- The Runecoin market cap is currently $316 million, with 21 billion tokens in circulation.\
- OKX will offer a daylong rewards campaign, putting up 1.75% of the total supply (367,500,000 tokens) for customers to earn before trading begins.\
- Runecoin is the first Runes token to be listed on OKX, which already supports Runes token trades on its peer-to-peer "Web3 marketplace."

news.headline: Someone Airdropped 21K Ordinals to Bitcoin Users as Part of Mysterious Game
news.summary:
- Someone airdropped 21,000 digital inscriptions called Ordinals to Bitcoin users as part of a mysterious game promotion.\
- The inscriptions are designed to secure a bag of runes and can be mined, sold, or allowed to fade.\
- The group behind the airdrop, called Runecoin, is unrelated to the Runes concept developed by Ordinals' original developer.\
- The airdrop has generated excitement and trading volume, but some have questioned its claims and marketing tactics.\
- The Runecoin Twitter account clarified that the runes protocol has not been launched yet and no runes have been etched.\
- Critics urge caution and emphasize the importance of transparency and informed decision-making.

news.headline: Tune FM Secures $50M from Global Emerging Markets for Hedera-Based Music Streaming Platform
news.summary:
- Tune FM, a decentralized music streaming platform on the Hedera Hashgraph blockchain, has secured a $50 million capital commitment from Global Emerging Markets Group.\
- The platform uses its JAM token to enable artists to receive streaming royalties through blockchain micropayments.\
- This funding aims to help Tune FM compete with established platforms like Spotify by offering artists up to 100 times more per stream.\
- The investment will support Tune FM's growth and enhance its ability to provide better compensation to artists.

news.headline: Tune.FM, Music Streaming Project on Hedera Blockchain, Gets $50M Capital Commitment
news.summary:
- **Funding Boost**: Tune.FM, a Web3 music platform on the Hedera Hashgraph blockchain, secured a $50 million capital commitment from the Global Emerging Markets (GEM) Group.\
- **Previous Funding**: This new investment follows an earlier $20 million funding round completed just eight months ago.\
- **Artist Royalties**: Tune.FM aims to enhance artist earnings through streaming royalty micropayments and digital music collectibles using its native JAM token.\
- **User Growth & Development**: The new funds will be used to grow its user base, promote its token, and support marketing, development, and new product offerings.\
- **New Desktop App**: Tune.FM plans to launch a desktop application for Mac and Windows to complement its existing mobile apps on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

news.headline: Decentralized exchange Orion Protocol hacked for $3 million
DeFi project Orion Protocol raises $3.45 million in 'dynamic coin offering'
Mavryk Network Raises $10M for UAE Real-Estate Tokenization Plans
news.summary:
- Mavryk Network has raised $10 million to fund its plans for tokenizing UAE real estate assets.  \
- The funding aims to enable fractional ownership and increase liquidity in the UAE property market through blockchain.  \
- The project is part of a broader trend of real estate tokenization gaining traction in the Middle East.  \
- Details on the investors or timeline for the rollout have not been disclosed.  \
- This move highlights growing investor interest in combining crypto technology with traditional real estate markets.

news.headline: Ethereum Time Capsule to Preserve Memories, Memes and More
news.summary:
- Ethereum will celebrate its 10th anniversary on July 30 with a community-submitted time capsule, capturing memories, memes, art, and predictions.  \
- Contributions are open from June 30 to July 30, secured by Shutter Network encryption until July 30, 2026.  \
- The smart contract controlling the capsule will decrypt and record submissions on Ethereum at the opening, ensuring immutability and privacy until then.  \
- Entry fee is 0.001 ETH (~$2.50), with proceeds supporting Protocol Guild’s Ethereum development efforts.  \
- Notable submission includes a picture of EthCC speakers sealed by contributor Loring Harkness.  \
- Ethereum remains the second-largest blockchain, recently refreshed by new leadership, a simplified roadmap, and the Pectra hard fork amid ongoing community evolution.

news.headline: Ethereum community plans onchain ‘time capsule’ to mark 10th anniversary of network’s genesis block
news.summary:
- Ethereum community launches onchain “time capsule” to mark its 10th anniversary, allowing users to encrypt and store memories, art, and messages for $2.50 in ETH.  \
- The capsule was unveiled at EthCC and is supported by Protocol Guild and Shutter Network; entries will be sealed on July 30 and decrypted on the network’s 11th anniversary next year.  \
- Proceeds from submissions will be donated to the Protocol Guild to fund core research; encryption ensures entries remain sealed until opened in 2026.  \
- The initiative celebrates Ethereum’s history, with Vitalik Buterin’s whitepaper published in 2013 and the network now valued at nearly $300 billion.  \
- The capsule aims to foster community reflection and culture as Ethereum prepares for its next decade of development.  \
- The project underscores Ethereum’s role as a leading programmable blockchain and its ongoing community-driven initiatives.

news.headline: Watch-and-Earn Platform Myco Reveals Community Film Funding Program
news.summary:
- Myco, the token-driven watch-and-earn platform, has launched Mycolab, a community funding program for filmmakers.\
- Filmmakers can submit project proposals to join a list of 30 projects, with 10 ultimately chosen for funding.\
- If a project can raise 35% of its target budget through crowdfunding, Myco will provide the remaining 65%.\
- Completed projects will premiere on the Myco platform, which pays out MContent crypto tokens to viewers and creators.\
- Myco plans to bring the content to other platforms, support festival participation, and help spread the Myco brand.\
- Users can contribute cryptocurrency or fiat currency during the funding process and gain access to special perks.

news.headline: Warped Games Embraces Premature Teaser Release to Highlight "Warped Universe"
news.summary:
- Warped Games studio had promotional material leaked for their in-development title "Warped Universe" on X/Twitter\
- Leak gained traction and caught the attention of Web3 gaming influencers\
- Warped Team decided to keep the leaked post live due to positive market reaction\
- "Warped Universe" is a Sci-Fi title with multiple mission types and a user-driven gameplay\
- The game aims to stand out with a unique art style and community-centric features\
- Two of the game modes mentioned are real-time action shooter and turn-based strategy

news.headline: Unpacking the Balancer V2 Exploit Fallout
The Bankless Guide to Sonic
Trove Markets perpetrator is Chinese crypto scammer, report
news.summary:
- Crypto sleuth "Eyeonchains" identified Jin Qing Qing from Shanghai, China, as the alleged true perpetrator behind the Trove Markets token launch failure.\
- Trove Markets failed spectacularly, shedding $19 million in value rapidly and retaining $9.4 million of the $11.4 million raised in its ICO.\
- The pseudonymous founder "Unwise," previously suspected, is now believed by Eyeonchains to be merely a "frontman puppet."\
- Eyeonchains traced ICO funds across exchanges like Binance and Bybit to a Gate deposit address linked to Jin Qing Qing via connections to the TAKER token and PoP Planet.\
- Jin Qing Qing is allegedly connected to 24 domains, including multiple crypto scam and casino sites, and reportedly received a $4 million investment from Foresight Ventures.\
- Evidence linking Jin to the scheme has been submitted to "the appropriate authorities," according to Eyeonchains.

news.headline: Coinbase CLO to Address ‘Operation Chokepoint 2.0’ in Congressional Hearing
Give Retail Investors a Voice in Crypto Policymaking
Unstoppable Domains Partners with Propykeys and Tybasegod to Launch .Propykeys and .bald Onchain Domains
news.summary:
- Unstoppable Domains has partnered with Propykeys to launch .Propykeys onchain domains, aiming to streamline real estate transactions in the digital age.\
- This collaboration marks their first venture with a decentralized application (dApp) on the Base network.\
- Users can create personalized digital identities and manage real estate assets more efficiently.\
- Additionally, Unstoppable Domains has introduced .bald, a new top-level domain (TLD) in partnership with Tybasegod, a prominent memecoin on the Base network, to simplify crypto transactions.\
- Unstoppable Domains has been recognized as a Webacy Approved Partner, ensuring secure operations with their EmbeddedSafety™ APIs.

news.headline: Rizzmas is Back? Christmas Solana Meme Coin Wakes From Hibernation
news.summary:
- Solana meme coin Rizzmas surged 54% on Tuesday, reaching a market cap of $4.38 million amid growing festive interest.\
- The token previously hit a peak market cap of $94.26 million during the 2024 holiday meme coin run before crashing nearly 98% by the start of 2025.\
- The Rizzmas CTO team has planned major marketing pushes for December, including New York City billboards and collaborations with major figures.\
- Development efforts have included launching an iOS mini-game where ad revenue is used to burn Rizzmas tokens, alongside merchandise releases.\
- The team is attempting to evolve the meme's meaning beyond a purely festive token to represent "rizz more" (charisma/flirting more).\
- Pump.fun, the launchpad where Rizzmas originated, has seen a significant drop in activity compared to its peak last year.

news.headline: Trump’s new investment platform prepares to launch Bitcoin Plus ETF
news.summary:
- Donald Trump’s media company, Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), is launching a fintech investment platform called Truth.Fi, which includes a Bitcoin Plus ETF among six new investment products.\
- The Bitcoin Plus ETF aims to provide exposure to multiple cryptocurrencies, expanding beyond the typical Bitcoin and Ethereum offerings in the US ETF market.\
- Truth.Fi's other investment products will focus on sectors like energy and manufacturing, with Charles Schwab partnering to manage these offerings.\
- TMTG's head, Devin Nunes, emphasizes the platform's goal to offer alternatives to "woke funds" and address market debanking issues.\
- Trump's crypto ventures, including Truth.Fi, are part of a broader $16 billion crypto empire that also features memecoins, NFTs, and a DeFi app.\
- The launch comes amid Trump's administration's efforts to reshape crypto regulations, potentially benefiting from policy changes that could favor his business interests.

news.headline: DAOs are the future of Web3
news.summary:
- DAOs have gained popularity in the Web3 space, with many successful projects operating as DAOs.\
- DAOs are starting to gain traction in real-world use cases, particularly in funding scientific research.\
- Scientific research DAO projects include VitaDAO, ValleyDAO, and AthenaDAO.\
- Blockchain and DAOs offer opportunities to transform the scientific research landscape by giving scientists more autonomy and democratizing ownership of intellectual property.\
- DAOs are also being used for fundraising for charities and campaigns, as well as other creative use cases such as decentralized ownership of real estate and sports teams.\
- Analysts predict that DAOs could be the next mainstream success in blockchain innovation.

news.headline: Science has a transparency problem. Some scientists are turning to DAOs
news.summary:
- Nature Biotechnology published an editorial advocating for the use of decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs) in science.\
- The article highlights two main benefits of DAOs in research: easier funding and greater transparency.\
- DAO governance allows researchers to collectively vote on funding projects and potentially mint resulting intellectual property as NFTs.\
- DAOs like VitaDAO, ValleyDAO, and AthenaDAO are mentioned as examples focusing on life longevity, environmental sustainability, and women's health.\
- DAOs could also enable patients in medical trials to own their treatments, as seen in the case of HairDAO.\
- The integration of DAOs into scientific research is currently limited, but VitaDAO has already minted IP-NFTs and secured significant funding allocations.

news.headline: Bitcoin Meme Coin Launchpad Odin.fun Loses $7 Million in Liquidity Exploit
Centralized Exchanges Are Already Listing Bitcoin Runes—Which Ones Will Be Next?
news.summary:
- Bitcoin's new Runes fungible token standard has gained immediate demand and has led to high network fees on the original blockchain network.\
- Cayman Islands-based exchange Gate.io has already listed three Runes tokens: SATOSHI•NAKAMOTO, MEME•ECONOMICS, and WANKO•MANKO•RUNES.\
- The first 10 Runes tokens are speculated to be the biggest targets for centralized exchanges to list.\
- Gate.io has a history of being the first to list new digital assets, such as ORDI, and other exchanges may follow suit with Runes.\
- Runes is a new standard for creating tokens on the Bitcoin blockchain, allowing for the creation of non-unique tokens that can be exchanged.\
- Centralized exchanges like Binance and OKX are showing interest in Runes, potentially leading to broader adoption.

news.headline: This Week in Crypto Games: B3's Self-Destruct PC, Avalanche Battle Pass
Halliday Secures $20M Series A from Andreessen Horowitz to Develop AI Agents, Eliminating Need for Smart Contracts
news.summary:
- Halliday, a company focused on developing AI agents for blockchain, has raised $20 million in a Series A funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz's crypto arm, a16z crypto.\
- This funding follows a $6 million seed round in 2022, also led by a16z crypto, bringing Halliday's total funding to $26 million.\
- Other investors in the Series A round include Avalanche Blizzard Fund, Credibly Neutral, Alt Layer, and SV Angel.\
- Halliday aims to simplify blockchain development by allowing developers to delegate workflows to autonomous systems, eliminating the need for smart contracts.\
- The company's Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP) is designed to create 'immutable guardrails' for AI agents, ensuring safe operations on blockchain networks.\
- Halliday's technology is already in use with partners like DeFi Kingdoms, Core Wallet by Ava Labs, and ApeChain, automating complex processes such as treasury management and B2B transactions across multiple blockchain networks.

news.headline: L2 Adoption Wanes Despite Base Activity Continuing To Surge
news.summary:
- **Layer 2 Decline**: Adoption of Ethereum Layer 2 (L2) solutions is decreasing, with combined throughput of Ethereum L2 and Layer 3 networks hitting a low of 254.5 transactions per second (TPS) on Oct. 6, a 73% drop from the all-time high in August.\
- **Base's Growth**: Despite the overall decline, Base, Coinbase's Layer 2 network, is thriving, reaching a record high of over 66 TPS on Oct. 4 and nearly 1.52 million active addresses.\
- **Arbitrum and Linea**: Arbitrum and Linea have seen significant drops in activity, with Linea's active users down 87% from July and Arbitrum's users down 62% from May.\
- **Layer 3 Performance**: Arbitrum’s Layer 3 ecosystem shows mixed results, with Xai's daily throughput down but its 30-day transaction count up, while PlayBlock and Winr show varied performance in transaction volumes.

news.headline: Solana AI Tokens Look to Mount Comeback
news.summary:
- Small-cap Solana AI agent tokens like SwarmNodeai (SNAI), Heurist (HEU), and GRIFFAIN are rallying, with SNAI up nearly 230% over the past week.  \
- SNAI has fallen 90% from its $130 million market cap high; HEU is down 77% from its $460 million peak, and GRIFFAIN is down 93% from $625 million.  \
- Larger AI tokens such as AI16Z, GOAT, and VIRTUAL are declining today, with AI16Z down 10%, VIRTUAL down 5%, and GOAT down 4%.  \
- The rebound follows a broader altcoin rally over the weekend, amid renewed interest in AI-related projects on Solana.  \
- The recent price movements are fueling optimism around the pumpfun ecosystem, with PUMP, a memecoin launched via the same platform, up over 16% today and nearly 23% this week.  \
- The AI agent sector remains significantly below its all-time highs, despite recent gains in smaller tokens.

news.headline: Mrgn’s co-founder built a new product. Mrgn isn’t a fan.
news.summary:
- Edgar Pavlovsky, co-founder of Marginfi, left the Solana DeFi project in April due to disagreements and is now a core contributor to Paladin, a Solana client aimed at protecting validators from sandwich attacks.\
- Temporal, a crypto research firm with ties to Marginfi, has launched Nozomi, a proprietary client also designed to prevent sandwich attacks, but with a focus on fast transaction execution and whitelisted validators.\
- Paladin and Nozomi target the same niche but differ in approach; Paladin uses a token (PAL) to gate access to its validators, while Nozomi does not have a native token.\
- Temporal's Jakob Povsic criticized Paladin's approach as naive and self-serving, while Pavlovsky defended Paladin's systematic anti-sandwich measures and openness to discussing tradeoffs.\
- Marginfi has faced criticism for not launching a native token, a point Pavlovsky hinted contributed to his departure, advocating for a token release in Q4 2023.

news.headline: Why Mode Network’s investor deposits dropped 99% in one year
news.summary:
- Mode Network’s TVL has plummeted 99% from its May 2024 peak, now just under $4 million, despite claiming over $500 million on its website.  \
- Its native token, Mode, has declined over 98% from its all-time high a year ago.  \
- The project launched with a $5.3 million grant from Optimism in January 2024, with a peak TVL of $582 million in May 2024, driven by incentivized liquidity campaigns.  \
- The rapid growth was short-lived, typical of incentive-driven DeFi projects that flame out once rewards stop.  \
- Mode now has minimal user engagement and virtually no onchain revenue, reflecting a broader trend of ephemeral DeFi growth.  \
- Similar to other incentive-based protocols like Berachain, Mode’s decline underscores the risks of liquidity farming and token emission strategies.

news.headline: Everyone Wants a Piece of the Bitcoin Pie, Now the AI Bots Are Coming for It Too
news.summary:
- Bitcoin's market cap consistently exceeds 50% of the total crypto industry, with dominance reaching over 60% during the current bull market.\
- AI-focused Ethereum layer-2 blockchain Mode is bridging to Bitcoin to tap into its liquidity, partnering with rollup protocol BitcoinOS (BOS).\
- BOS has previously integrated with the Cardano network using its Grail bridge, which employs zero-knowledge (ZK) technology for asset transfers.\
- Mode, built with Optimism's OP Stack, aims to scale DeFi applications through on-chain AI agents.

news.headline: Most Influential: Jesse Pollak
news.summary:
- Jesse Pollak, the creator of Coinbase's Layer-2 network Base, is credited with the network's significant popularity growth throughout 2025.\
- Base launched in 2023 and quickly became a major L2, crossing $15 billion in Total Value Locked (TVL) in January 2025, second only to Arbitrum.\
- Growth drivers for Base include low transaction costs (under a cent) and the rise of DeFi, social apps, and memecoins on the chain.\
- Key ecosystem drivers in 2025 included the decentralized exchange Aerodrome Finance (surging past $1B TVL in January 2025) and the decentralized social network Zora.\
- Pollak faced backlash in November 2025 following the launch of the $JESSE memecoin, which users alleged was heavily botted and siphoned liquidity.\
- Pollak hinted that Base may be developing a native token, generating anticipation among active users.

news.headline: How snipers scooped $1.3m from Base creator Jesse Pollak’s token
news.summary:
- Two traders sniped Jesse Pollak’s $25M Jesse token launch, netting $1.3M in profits within minutes by buying half of the 500M tokens immediately after liquidity was seeded.  \
- Snipers used bots and private channels to execute rapid buy transactions, paying over $44,000 in fees for a quick $626,000 profit on a $190,000 investment.  \
- The Jesse token peaked at $25M market cap but has since fallen 36% after the snipers sold their holdings.  \
- Pollak launched the token to challenge stigma around creator coins, which are part of the SocialFi trend that has struggled to gain traction.  \
- Since launch, Jesse has seen over $25M in trading volume; Pollak is using fees to support other creator coins on Zora.  \
- Critics label creator coins as memecoins, while supporters like Pollak aim to empower content creators with ownership.

news.headline: N3on promised ‘up, up, up’ memecoin without any risk — it’s down 96%
news.summary:
- Social media streamer Rangesh Mutama, known as "N3on," is facing backlash after his eponymous memecoin on the Solana-based platform Thrust plummeted 96% from its initial peak.\
- The N3ON token listed on Meteora on November 12, 2025, reaching a peak market capitalization of $38 million shortly after launch following a limited pre-sale.\
- The token has consistently lost value every week since its launch without exception.\
- N3on previously guaranteed a "without any risk" scenario in a November 11, 2025, clip, promising tokenholders would see continuous gains: "up, up, up, up, up, and it never goes down."\
- Despite the token's collapse, Thrust's homepage continues to prominently feature the N3ON token.\
- N3on recently attempted to repair his image by giving away luxury merchandise in person alongside other streamers like Adin Ross.

news.headline: You Can Play Super Nintendo, N64, and Other Classic Games on Bitcoin—Here’s How
news.summary: The Ordinals protocol allows users to inscribe games and applications onto the Bitcoin blockchain, preserving them for as long as the network exists. This alternative to NFTs has seen over 50 million bits of media, including playable video games, etched onto the blockchain. While these games are not officially sanctioned ports from the original developers, there are some good renditions available. Examples include a customized Super Nintendo emulator called Pizza Ninja, Pac-Man, Tetris, a Doom clone, Zork, and Snake. These games can be played legally with public domain games or ROMs owned by the user. This development is seen as a way to ensure the survival of classic games in an era where digital games are often delisted and difficult to access.

news.headline: NEAR Protocol Rebounds 9% as Investors Capitalize on Market Dislocation
news.summary:
- NEAR Protocol surged 9% amid broader market dislocation, signaling investor optimism.  \
- The rebound follows a strategic alliance with Everclear, aiming to tap into the $1 trillion cross-chain settlement market.  \
- The partnership positions NEAR to benefit from increasing regulatory clarity and cross-chain activity.  \
- Major cryptocurrencies like ETH (+3.06%) and BNB (+1.05%) also saw gains, while XRP and DOGE declined.  \
- Overall market sentiment appears to be shifting towards risk-on, with blockchain firms capitalizing on dislocated prices.  \
- The move highlights growing institutional interest in cross-chain solutions and regulatory developments in crypto.

news.headline: Everclear, the Ethereum Foundation-backed interoperability protocol, launches mainnet
news.summary:
- Everclear, a cross-chain settlement protocol backed by the Ethereum Foundation, has launched its mainnet, enhancing blockchain interoperability.\
- Originally launched as Connext in 2017, Everclear has rebranded and strategically pivoted to focus on intent-based bridges using the Arbitrum Orbit-based rollup chain.\
- The protocol has achieved $125 million in monthly volume and aims to simplify cross-chain transactions with features like intent protocols and intents-based bridges.\
- Everclear's technology abstracts the complexities of multiple blockchains, allowing seamless interaction with decentralized applications across any blockchain with minimal fees and latency under 10 seconds.\
- A partnership with Renzo protocol has facilitated over $1 billion in total value locked by enabling cross-chain restaking of staked ETH derivatives.\
- The project is supported by prominent investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, Consensys, and others.

news.headline: Trading RWA Perps with Ostium
news.summary:
- Ostium is a perpetuals platform built on Arbitrum that offers leveraged trading for both crypto assets and Real World Assets (RWAs).\
- The platform allows users to trade synthetic perps for RWAs, including commodities (gold, silver, copper), forex pairs (EUR/USD), and major stocks (NVDA, TSLA, MSFT).\
- Users can access up to 200x leverage on some markets while maintaining self-custody via existing Ethereum wallets or gasless smart wallets.\
- Ostium utilizes Chainlink oracles for crypto price feeds and Stork for RWA price feeds.\
- Trading pairs are settled in USDC, which can be deposited via CEX transfer, credit card purchase, or bridging other tokens.\
- The platform has already achieved over $25B in trade volume and is featuring an ongoing points program.

news.headline: DeFi users buying Coinbase and Nvidia send tokenised stocks to all-time high
Solana AI Agent Hackathon Tokens Soar to $500 Million Market Cap
news.summary:
- Tokens from the Solana AI Agents hackathon have reached a combined market cap of over $500 million, as reported by Yash Agarwal on January 5.\
- The surge in demand for AI Agent tokens is attributed to the success of leading projects like AI16Z and Virtuals Protocol.\
- Data from Pine Analytics indicates that the market cap of these projects peaked at $516 million on January 4, with 64 projects averaging a market cap of $7.8 million.\
- Thirteen projects have market caps exceeding $10 million, while 42 projects are above $1 million.\
- The top five tokens by market cap are SEND ($89.7M), FXN ($66.6M), BONGO ($34.7M), ASSAI ($36.7M), and NEUR ($35.1M).\
- Despite the growth, some experts criticize the trend as "hypertokenization," suggesting many projects resemble memecoins rather than offering substantial utility.

news.headline: ‘Agents’ swarm inaugural Solana AI hackathon
news.summary:
- The inaugural Solana AI hackathon concluded with over 400 projects competing for cash prizes and attention for AI agents, which are gaining traction in crypto social feeds.\
- Some entrants already have tokens with market caps in the millions, focusing on AI agent copilots for crypto trading and AI agent “swarms.”\
- The hackathon, organized by SendAI, will announce winners around Jan. 10, with a list of entrants and details expected soon.\
- The total market capitalization of tokens from the hackathon has surpassed $200 million, comparable to Solana DeFi protocol Orca’s native token.\
- Notable project FXN, an AI swarm protocol, briefly reached a $70 million market cap and currently stands at $44 million.\
- The hackathon highlights the growing trend of AI agents in on-chain trading and DeFi, with many projects aiming to create intelligent interfaces for the Solana ecosystem.

news.headline: Strike CEO Jack Mallers announces Shopify partnership, new payment network
NYDIG Adds Another Partnership to Expand Bitcoin’s Reach into Banking
Flare Network launches FAssets with FXRP to bring XRP into DeFi
news.summary:
- Flare Network launches FAssets protocol, starting with FXRP v1.2, enabling XRP to be used in DeFi without intermediaries.  \
- FXRP is a one-to-one synthetic version of XRP secured by overcollateralization and Flare’s data protocols, allowing seamless movement across the ecosystem.  \
- The rollout includes a capped minting of 5 million FXRP in the first week, with options to bridge XRP or buy on decentralized exchanges like SparkDEX and BlazeSwap.  \
- FXRP will be used as collateral in Enosys Loans for XRP-backed stablecoins and to support liquid staking derivatives like stXRP.  \
- The project has undergone multiple audits by Zellic, Coinspect, and ongoing security reviews, with incentives offering APRs up to 50%.  \
- This development marks XRP’s first step into DeFi, expanding its role within Flare’s ecosystem and broader crypto applications.

news.headline: FLR Price Hits 6-Month High amid SparkDEX Token Launch Buzz
news.summary:
- FLR (Flare) price surged over 100% from April lows, hitting a 6-month high, with 24-hour trading volume up over 240%.  \
- The rally is driven by excitement around SparkDEX’s upcoming SPRK token launch next week, which will be the first full-scale Flare-native IDO via Flarepad.  \
- Flare’s TVL has quadrupled since April, rising from ~$50M to $224M, boosted by USDT0 stablecoin launch and DeFi incentive programs.  \
- XRP has gained over 60% in the past month, reaching nearly $3.30, as Flare positions itself as a key DeFi platform for XRP assets.  \
- Flare’s ecosystem now includes lending, trading, perpetuals, and the upcoming Firelight protocol for XRP staking, fueling network interest.  \
- The recent USDT0 launch and ecosystem expansion have significantly contributed to Flare’s recent momentum and TVL growth.

news.headline: AllUnity and Stripe’s Privy Join Forces to Enable Euro Stablecoin Payments
news.summary:
- AllUnity, a BaFin-licensed German e-money institution, partners with Stripe-owned Privy to integrate EURAU, a regulated euro stablecoin, into wallet infrastructure for fintechs and enterprises.  \
- The integration enables users to pay, receive, hold, and convert digital euros between stablecoins and fiat, supporting programmable treasury tools like automated payroll and supplier payouts.  \
- This move positions EURAU within Stripe’s broader crypto ecosystem, offering a regulated euro option to mainstream payment flows, unlike the majority of stablecoins which track the US dollar.  \
- AllUnity CEO Alexander Höptner highlights the milestone for EURAU adoption, while Privy CEO Henri Stern notes euro stablecoin use remains underdeveloped compared to dollar counterparts.  \
- The partnership aligns with EU regulators’ upcoming enforcement of MiCAR in 2026, following French bank SocGen’s recent stablecoin debut with Bullish Europe.

news.headline: Justin Sun’s graveyard of abandoned crypto projects
news.summary:
- Justin Sun, known for launching successful projects like TRON ($28B market cap), has also overseen numerous failed or abandoned ventures.  \
- USDD, a Terra-like stablecoin, was rebranded and its governance claims abandoned; its market cap dropped from ~$790M to $469M.  \
- EthereumFair, initially endorsed by Sun, has rebranded as Gougoubi Labs, with its original chain now renamed DisChain.  \
- BTT, the BitTorrent token, peaked at $2B but now trades around $466M; its ecosystem includes dApps like BitTorrent Speed and File System, with some features still “coming soon.”  \
- Sun’s stablecoin USDJ and stablecoin project TrueUSD have seen significant declines, with market caps falling from hundreds of millions to under $20M and $500M, respectively.  \
- Sun’s AI-focused projects, including SunLumi and SunGenX, have minimal activity, and the AINFT marketplace remains largely unused amid multiple rebrandings and failed features.

news.headline: Hong Kong Doubles Down on Crypto Regulation With Staff Hires
news.summary:
- Hong Kong's Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) plans to hire eight new staff members specifically for crypto regulation, as part of a broader initiative to enhance market surveillance and enforcement investigations.\
- This hiring push is part of a two-year budget plan presented to the Legislative Council, despite a forecasted budget deficit of HK$100 million ($13 million) for the year.\
- The SFC's expansion includes a total of 15 new roles, with more than half dedicated to the crypto sector, reflecting Hong Kong's commitment to strengthening its regulatory framework for digital assets.\
- In 2023, Hong Kong introduced a licensing regime for crypto firms and is working on a stablecoin regulatory framework, with discussions on a stablecoin bill still ongoing.\
- The move to bolster crypto regulation comes after a period of headcount freezes in three of the past five financial years since 2020.

news.headline: Exploring the TON gaming ecosystem with Hamster Kombat, Gamee and TON Ventures
news.summary:
- Episode 2 of The Crypto Beat features Tim Copeland (The Block), Bozena Rezab (GAMEE), Hamster Girl (Hamster Kombat), and Inal Kardan (TON Ventures) discussing the TON gaming ecosystem.\
- Key topics include the growth of gaming within the TON ecosystem, community engagement in Hamster Kombat, and the use of Telegram Mini Apps.\
- The discussion also covers strategies for Telegram growth, the Tap-to-Earn model, Web3 onboarding, and investment opportunities in Telegram games.\
- The Block is launching a new community experience on Lens and offers newsletters for the latest crypto and DeFi market news.\
- The Block operates independently despite Foresight Ventures being a majority investor, ensuring objective and timely crypto industry information.

news.headline: GAMEE’s WatBird Gears Up for September Token Launch on The Open Network
PumpFun Token Launches Drop 80%
news.summary:
- The PumpFun token launchpad on Solana experienced a significant decline, with token launches dropping 80% from their peak, launching only 11,000 tokens on March 3 compared to 70,000 on January 23.\
- Despite the drop, the number of tokens launched is still higher than the summer of 2024, when daily launches ranged between 4,000 and 7,000.\
- The memecoin market has been struggling since the LIBRA rug pull in February, affecting the performance of PumpFun's tokens like GOAT, FARTCOIN, and FWOG, which are down 85-95% from their all-time highs.\
- The only recent success in the memecoin market has been PWEASE, a JD Vance-themed token, which reached a $33 million valuation before falling to a $14 million market cap.\
- Since its launch in March 2024, PumpFun has facilitated the creation of over 8 million tokens, traded by 14 million active addresses.

news.headline: How Solana is cutting MEV snipers out of token launches
news.summary:
- Solana is developing new token launch methods to combat MEV sniping and frontrunning, which are common due to observable transactions in RPC queues.  \
- Metaplex’s “Uniform Price Auctions” allow community members to bid for tokens at a single clearing price, reducing incentives for snipers and increasing transparency.  \
- Heaven’s memecoin launchpad pairs with an AMM DEX and enforces a six-second “sniper tax” to deter bots during initial trading.  \
- Ellipsis’ Gavel ties token sales to a sandwich-resistant AMM, migrating funds at the same price to prevent post-sale arbitrage and sniping.  \
- Meteora offers anti-sniper features like decaying fees and size-based surcharges to slow early bot activity and promote organic demand.  \
- Orca’s Wavebreak uses a bonding curve combined with onchain CAPTCHA to slow bots, but does not fully exclude automated snipers.

news.headline: Memecoin Trading Platforms Continue to Innovate Despite Dwindling Volumes
news.summary:
- Memecoin trading volumes are declining, but platforms like Photon, Zora, Heaven, and Pumpfun continue to innovate with new features and launchpad activity.  \
- Photon introduced a multi-wallet trading bundle and send feature on Aug. 21 to boost user engagement and compete with Axiom.  \
- Zora expanded its platform with tokenized video shorts, while Heaven DEX became the second busiest launchpad over the past 24 hours, with Pumpfun dominating Solana memecoin market share.  \
- Solana memecoin trading volume in August is projected to reach ~$100 billion, down from July’s $117 billion and significantly below January’s $262 billion peak.  \
- Kanye West’s “YZY” memecoin launched on Aug. 20, quickly reaching a $3.2 billion valuation before declining, amid skepticism over its timing and associated controversies.  \
- The launch coincided shortly after legal issues involving LIBRA memecoin figures, adding to the token’s controversial backdrop.

news.headline: Filecoin Slumps More Than 10%
news.summary:
- Filecoin (FIL) dropped over 10% amid broader crypto market volatility.  \
- Major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum experienced gains of around 6-7%, with BTC at $85,508.87 and ETH at $2,823.93.  \
- Altcoins such as Dogecoin and Cardano surged, with DOGE up 9.16% and ADA up 10.53%.  \
- Stablecoins USDT, USDC, and USDS remained relatively stable, trading near $1.00.  \
- Overall market sentiment remains mixed, with some tokens rallying while others face sharp declines.

news.headline: AI Payments Startup Kite Debuts Token With $263M Trading Volume in First Two Hours
news.summary:
- AI payments startup Kite launched a new token, achieving $263 million in trading volume within the first two hours.  \
- The rapid trading volume indicates strong market interest and potential for the token’s adoption.  \
- The article includes a snapshot of major cryptocurrencies’ prices, with Bitcoin at $106,162.57 and Ethereum at $3,647.81.  \
- Other notable tokens include BNB at $1,007.93, XRP at $2.4056, and Dogecoin at $0.1733.  \
- The overall market shows mixed movements, with some tokens like SUI (+6.72%) and HBAR (+6.60%) experiencing notable gains.  \
- The launch highlights growing investor enthusiasm for AI-focused crypto projects amid broader market activity.

news.headline: DeFi developer Ameen Soleimani takes another stab at peg-less stablecoin
news.summary:
- Ameen Soleimani, a prominent Ethereum developer, is launching a new version of a stablecoin called HAI, aiming to prove that decentralized stablecoins can thrive without being tied to the dollar.\
- HAI will be governed by holders of the related token KITE, and an airdrop of KITE will be available to users of RAI and the Optimism blockchain.\
- Unlike its predecessor RAI, HAI can be minted against multiple forms of collateral, making it more appealing to a broader range of users.\
- HAI will exist on the Optimism blockchain, settling on Ethereum for security purposes.\
- The stablecoin aims to provide stability while gradually drifting from $1, using a self-correcting mechanism to deter market manipulation.\
- Soleimani encourages the creation of more "float coins" and envisions a future where individuals can create their own banks using digital tools.

news.headline: Blocksquare and Vera Capital to Tokenize $1B U.S. Real Estate Starting with $5.4M Fort Lauderdale Property
news.summary:
- Blocksquare and Vera Capital will tokenize over $1 billion in U.S. commercial and multifamily real estate.  \
- The initial property to be tokenized is a $5.4 million asset in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.  \
- The partnership aims to enable global investors to access fractional ownership via blockchain technology.  \
- This initiative seeks to bring real-world assets onto the blockchain, expanding investment opportunities in U.S. real estate.  \
- The project is part of a broader trend of tokenizing traditional assets to increase liquidity and accessibility.  \
- The news was reported by DeepNewz and curated by The Defiant.

news.headline: Investigation Dismantles $100 Million Crypto Money Laundering Ring in Spain and Cyprus
news.summary:
- An international investigation led by Eurojust has dismantled a $100 million crypto money laundering ring operating in Spain and Cyprus, resulting in the arrest of 23 suspects.\
- The operation involved freezing $28 million in cryptocurrencies and seizing $8 million in cash during raids across Europe.\
- The scheme, active since 2023, involved a network of at least 52 members who conducted up to six money laundering transactions weekly, using commercial flights and public transport to move cash.\
- The group collaborated with external contacts linked to various global commercial companies to facilitate the laundering process.\
- Authorities from Spain, Cyprus, Germany, and Europol collaborated to trace illicit crypto flows, leading to 20 arrests in Spain, two in France, and one in Slovenia.\
- The investigation highlights the need for cross-border cooperation in tackling crypto-related crimes, as demonstrated by a similar operation in the U.K. that disrupted a larger Russian money laundering scheme.

news.headline: Spain National Fan Token Slides 20% After UEFA Euro 2024 Win
news.summary:
- The Spain National Fan Token (SNFT) dropped 20% to $0.024 within 24 hours following Spain's UEFA Euro 2024 victory, despite the national team's celebratory win.\
- The decline is attributed to "sell-the-fact" losses, a common phenomenon where prices surge in anticipation of an event and fall afterward.\
- SNFT's market cap stood at $565,000, while other fan tokens like Paris Saint-Germain and FC Barcelona saw gains of 2-4%, buoyed by a rise in Bitcoin's price.\
- Launched in 2021 with the Royal Spanish Football Federation and Bitci, SNFT aims to enhance fan engagement and provide exclusive experiences.\
- Research indicates fan tokens often experience anticipatory gains but tend to be volatile and underperform major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin in the long term.\
- Studies are divided on the impact of soccer tournaments on fan token values, with some suggesting larger tournaments like the Champions League have a more significant effect.

news.headline: Dave Portnoy Says Meme Coins Are 'Gambling' and Not Built to Last
news.summary:
- Dave Portnoy, founder of Barstool Sports, called meme coins "gambling" and predicted they won't last beyond the next four years.  \
- He shared his own chaotic experience with meme coins, including buying SafeMoon, getting sued, and losing millions on tokens like Libra, Greed, and JailStool.  \
- Portnoy described meme coins as rigged, dominated by early buyers with bots, and likened them to Ponzi schemes that are unsustainable.  \
- Despite some quick gains, he emphasized the risks, including real-life backlash from investors who lost large sums, like a man claiming to have lost $200,000.  \
- He acknowledged the scene's hype-driven nature and believes meme coins are here for the short term, with a grim outlook after four years.  \
- Portnoy's comments highlight the speculative, risky, and ultimately unstable nature of meme coins in crypto culture.

news.headline: Dave Portnoy’s pathetic memecoin picks are down at least 97%
news.summary:
- Dave Portnoy claims memecoin collecting is a hobby but has promoted tokens that have declined at least 97%, with some losing over 99% of their value.  \
- His most notable token, JAILSTOOL, was worth $217 million in early 2025 but has since fallen 97% to under $7 million.  \
- Portnoy promoted several memecoins like GREED, GREED2, KOLHAT, and LIBRADICK, all of which have plummeted over 99% from their highs.  \
- He has a history of pump-and-dump tactics, often benefiting from quick pump-and-dump cycles, despite regulators' past enforcement against such schemes.  \
- Kraken faced criticism for sponsoring Portnoy’s crypto show amid the controversial memecoin promotions.  \
- Portnoy was refunded $5 million after buying a fake LIBRA token, highlighting the risky and often fraudulent nature of his memecoin ventures.

news.headline: Web3 notifications protocol Push to launch its own Layer 1 chain
news.summary:
- Push Protocol is developing Push Chain, a Layer 1 blockchain aimed at improving web3 application accessibility and addressing scalability issues.\
- Push Chain will serve as a common settlement layer for various Layer 1 and Layer 2 blockchains, featuring wallet and gas fee abstraction, sharding, and sub-one-second transaction finality.\
- The project marks a strategic shift from Push's original role as a cross-chain notifications and messaging protocol for decentralized applications.\
- An initial testnet for Push Chain is set to launch in mid-January 2025, with the mainnet expected later in the year.\
- Push Protocol, formerly known as Ethereum Push Notification Service, raised $10.1 million in a Series A funding round in 2022, led by Jump Crypto.\
- The Block, an independent media outlet, notes that Foresight Ventures, a majority investor, also invests in other crypto companies, but maintains editorial independence.

news.headline: WazirX Hacker Has $5 Million Left After Dumping Uniswap, Chainlink, and Other Alts
news.summary:
- The hacker behind the WazirX exploit, suspected to be a North Korean group, has liquidated significant amounts of Uniswap (UNI), Chainlink (LINK), and The Sandbox (SAND), impacting their prices.\
- Nansen data reveals the hacker sold $859,514 worth of UNI, $2.77 million of LINK, and $1.6 million of SAND over the past week.\
- The hacker's wallet now holds $5 million, primarily in Celer Network (CELR), Ooki (OOKI), and Frontier (FRONT).\
- Despite the sell-off, Chainlink and The Sandbox saw gains of 2.57% and 3.61% respectively, while Uniswap dropped 6.1% over the last seven days.\
- Push Protocol (PUSH) experienced a significant drop, losing 24% over the week and 32% in the last 24 hours, due to low liquidity and a $529,167 sell-off by the hacker.\
- The varying impacts on token prices are attributed to differences in market cap and liquidity, with Chainlink, The Sandbox, and Uniswap having significantly higher market caps and volumes compared to Push Protocol.

news.headline: Solana Meme Coins TRUMP, VINE See Double Digit Gains in Market Lull
news.summary:
- Solana meme coins TRUMP and VINE have seen significant gains, with TRUMP rising 12.4% and VINE climbing 35.4% in the past 24 hours, despite a market lull among top cryptocurrencies.\
- The TRUMP token, endorsed by the U.S. President, rebounded after hitting its lowest price since launch, following controversial political comments by Trump and a 75% drop from its all-time high due to trade tensions.\
- Fartboy (FARTBOY), another Solana meme coin, surged 66.8% in a day, possibly linked to U.S. National Fart Day celebrations, while Vader AI (VADER) and Dogwifhat (WIF) also saw gains.\
- Despite these individual successes, the overall meme coin market is down 6% for the day, with Alpha (ALPHA) and Elon4AfD (ELON4AFD) experiencing significant losses of 39.7% and 38.7%, respectively.\
- The broader cryptocurrency market remains relatively stagnant, with no major movements among the top ten cryptocurrencies by market cap.

news.headline: Crypto-AI project Astra Nova blames $10 million loss on market maker hack, pledges to buy back tokens
news.summary:
- Astra Nova, a Saudi-based crypto-AI project, lost $10 million after a third-party market maker was hacked, liquidating 8.3% of its RVV token supply.  \
- The attacker swapped the tokens for $10.2 million USDT, causing RVV’s price to drop from $0.028 to $0.007, then rebounding to around $0.014.  \
- Astra Nova pledged to buy back the stolen tokens and offered a 10% bounty for their return, while cutting ties with the compromised market maker.  \
- The unusual move of converting stolen tokens into USDT and transferring to centralized exchanges raised suspicions among analysts.  \
- The project recently raised $48.3 million in funding and positions itself as an AI-native entertainment ecosystem from Saudi Arabia.  \
- Astra Nova is working with on-chain forensics and law enforcement to trace the breach, emphasizing that its smart contracts remain secure.

news.headline: Astra Nova Raises $48.3M to Grow Web3, AI Entertainment Ecosystem
news.summary:
- Astra Nova has raised $48.3 million to expand its Web3 and AI-driven entertainment ecosystem.  \
- The funding aims to accelerate development of new blockchain-based and AI-powered entertainment experiences.  \
- Details on the investors or specific use of funds were not disclosed.  \
- The move highlights growing investor interest in integrating Web3 and AI within entertainment sectors.  \
- Astra Nova plans to leverage the capital to enhance platform features and user engagement.  \
- This funding round underscores ongoing investment momentum in crypto and AI crossover projects as of October 2025.

news.headline: V Systems Project Update - Mainnet 2020
Ranger Labs Raises $1.9M, Eyes AI-Powered Crypto Trading Products
news.summary:
- Ranger Labs, a Solana-based DEX builder, has raised $1.9 million to expand its offerings, including AI-powered crypto trading products.\
- The startup's crypto perps aggregator, Ranger Protocol, pools perpetual contracts from multiple protocols to offer competitive deals, having facilitated $25 million in trades since its December launch.\
- Co-founders Coby Lim and Fathur Rahman plan to integrate AI-assisted trading strategies, leveraging AI agents to manage vaults with programmatic trading and data insights.\
- The integration of AI and DeFi, termed "DeFAI," aims to enhance trading efficiency through automation and predictive modeling, with rollouts expected in the coming quarters.\
- Ranger Labs is expanding its protocol base by incorporating contracts from Adrena and Drift, enhancing liquidity for institutional traders.\
- The funding round, led by RockawayX and joined by Asymmetric, Big Brain Holdings, RISE Capital, and Anagram, closed at a $30 million valuation.

news.headline: Bitcoin Spurs Double Digit Meme Coin Movements: Gigachad Goes Up, Moo Deng Down
news.summary:
- Meme coins are experiencing significant volatility following Bitcoin's surge past the $100,000 mark.\
- Ski Mask Dog (SKI) on Base chain is the biggest winner, up 50.8% on the day and 862% over the week, boosted by a U.S. Congressman’s endorsement.\
- Gigachad (GIGA) rose 36% after being listed on Coinbase and Kucoin, while Keyboard Cat (KEYCAT) and Michi (MICHI) saw gains of 21.8% and 21.3%, respectively.\
- Top 10 meme coins saw modest gains: Dogecoin (DOGE) up 6.6%, Shiba Inu (SHIB) 4.2%, and Pepe (PEPE) 4.6%; some, like Dogwifhat (WIF), Bonk (BONK), and Popcat (POPCAT), experienced minor losses.\
- Significant losers include Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) down 26.5%, Moo Deng (MOODENG) down 19.5%, and Just a chill guy (CHILLGUY) down 17.7%.\
- Hailey Welch’s Hawk Tuah (HAWK) on Solana saw a dramatic crash from a $491 million market cap to $35 million, amid scam accusations and SEC complaints.

news.headline: Pump.Fun Metrics Shatter All-Time Highs Again
news.summary:
- **Pump.Fun's Record Activity**: Memecoin launchpad Pump.Fun has hit new all-time highs, with daily active addresses reaching 78,000 on Oct. 17, a 20% increase from the previous high of 65,000 on July 31.\
- **Token Launch Surge**: On Oct. 14, Pump.Fun saw 25,000 unique memecoins created in a single day, a 22% increase from the previous high of 20,400 on August 13.\
- **Revenue Milestone**: Pump.Fun generated $7.3 million in revenue over the last seven days, surpassing its parent network Solana, which earned $6.2 million in the same period.\
- **Market Influence**: The surge in activity is attributed to the market's increasing risk appetite as Bitcoin nears $69,000 and the popularity of the $$GOAT memecoin, which has a market cap above $400 million.\
- **Social Media Buzz**: Pump.Fun celebrated its achievements on social media, highlighting the rise of $$GOAT as the highest-valued token on the platform, surpassing $MICHI's previous record of $208 million.
